question: Description of class C airspace based on classification of airspace

B: IFR flights only are permitted, all flights are provided with air traffic control service and are separated from each other.
C: IFR and VFR flights are permitted, all participating IFR flights receive an air traffic advisory service and all flights receive flight information service if requested.
D: IFR and VFR flights are permitted, IFR flights are provided with air traffic control service and are separated from other IFR flights. All flights receive traffic information as far as is practical. Class E shall not be used for control zones.
